Variant on `KexGroup1 <paramiko.kex_group1.KexGroup1>` where the prime "p" and
generator "g" are provided by the server.  A bit more work is required on the
client side, and a **lot** more on the server side.
sha1
sha256)
util)
DEBUG)
Message)

byte_ord
	byte_mask)
SSHException
